channel.title: English on 悦读
channel.description: Recent content in English on 悦读

item.title: 英语短篇小说 | The Hollow of the Three Hills 三丘之谷 纳桑尼尔·霍桑
item.description: In those strange old times, when fantastic dreams and madmen’s reveries were realized among the actual circumstances of life, two persons met together at an appointed hour and place. One was a lady, graceful in form and fair of feature, though pale and troubled, and smitten with an untimely blight in what should have been the fullest bloom of her years; the other was an ancient and meanly-dressed woman, of ill-favored aspect, and so withered, shrunken, and decrepit, that even the space since she began to decay must have exceeded the ordinary term of human existence.
